final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator focused on new energy vehicles, consumer electronics, and lifestyle products.

Style/medium: needs a clean, modern, universally approachable avatar aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a square avatar format with a clear focal center, legible at small sizes
Subject: must include visual references to new energy vehicles, digital/tech products, and everyday lifestyle goods — all three themes represented in a balanced, harmonious way
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, approachable atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that feels globally neutral and culturally safe — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be culturally neutral and inoffensive across both Chinese and international social platforms; must avoid any symbols, gestures, colors, or imagery that carry negative connotations in any major culture; must work visually at small avatar sizes
Avoid: must avoid religious symbols, political imagery, human faces or figures that could be misread, and any culturally sensitive color combinations (e.g., pure white-only or pure black-only backgrounds with certain symbol pairings)
